latin: Malenia, dea putredinis, gladium sustulit et dixit: 'ego Malenia sum, ensis Miquelae. et numquam victa sum.' mille heroes ante eam ceciderant. mille alii cadent.

questions.prompt: What does Malenia claim about herself?
How many heroes have fallen before her?

translation: Malenia, goddess of rot, raised her sword and said: 'I am Malenia, blade of Miquella. And I have never been defeated.' A thousand heroes had fallen before her. A thousand more will fall.
